untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'System popularity indicator' (trend-follower consensus metric) and price deviation in standard deviations from 200-day MA. Standard deviations calculation and system popularity are not available in the allowed indicator set. Vol_ratio_20 used as imperfect proxy for volume consensus; price deviation approximated by distance from sma_200 rather than precise stddev measure.
translation_notes: This signal fundamentally requires meta-level indicators (system popularity/consensus) and statistical measures (standard deviations) not present in the allowed set. Approximated using available volume and moving average indicators. The 'avoid contrarian positions' logic was inverted to create entry conditions that follow trend consensus rather than resist it. Original parameters (active_system_threshold_pct: 55, price_deviation_stddev: 1.5, volume_spike_multiple: 1.5) could not be precisely mapped.
